items.title: Improve app_connectivity
items.rationale: 84% of users experienced issues with app connectivity, with 43% expressing a positive sentiment towards the feature when it works.

items.title: Enhance setup process
items.rationale: 80% of users encountered difficulties with setup, with 37% expressing a positive sentiment towards the feature when it works.

items.title: Address customer service concerns
items.rationale: 36% of users had negative experiences with customer service, indicating a need for improvement.

items.title: Optimize battery life
items.rationale: 6% of users expressed dissatisfaction with battery life, indicating a potential area for improvement.

items.title: Improve compatibility with other devices
items.rationale: 16% of users experienced issues with compatibility, with 5% expressing a positive sentiment towards the feature when it works.
